findings.description: maxTokens inverted for multi-agent merge compact mode — compact retry got 12000 tokens vs 8000 for normal mode, giving MORE budget on retry when it should constrain output
generateKeywordEntries used v4-pro without auto-override to v4-flash — reasoning model consumes tokens from the 900-token budget, potentially truncating keyword extraction output
findings.fix: Added keywordModel auto-override matching analyzeCommentsWithDeepSeek pattern

findings.description: extractJsonObject truncation repair always used ] to close unclosed brackets — nested objects like {a: {b: c} would get ]] instead of }}
findings.fix: Replaced depth counter with stack-based bracket type tracking, with string/escape awareness

findings.description: findLexiconMarks word-boundary check only tested first indexOf occurrence — valid standalone occurrences after a bad-boundary first hit were incorrectly skipped
findings.fix: Replaced single indexOf with while loop checking all occurrences; term valid if any occurrence has clean boundaries
